summary: Testing completed for POS page redesign and Purchases CRUD operations. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: POS Page (POSPage.js): Redesigned layout with left sidebar (task menu), center products table, right sidebar (20 product shortcuts)
POS Page has proper data-testid attributes for all key elements
Purchases CRUD APIs (server.py lines 2681-2798): GET, PUT, DELETE endpoints working correctly
PUT /api/purchases/{id} correctly updates paid_amount, remaining, status and supplier balance
DELETE /api/purchases/{id} correctly reverses stock, supplier balance, and cash box changes
PurchasesPage.js (lines 786-810): Edit/Delete buttons with proper data-testid attributes in table actions column
seed_data_creation: Test purchases created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) POS page redesigned with left sidebar (shortcuts menu), center table, right sidebar (20 product shortcut buttons), 2) PUT /api/purchases/{id} updates paid_amount and notes, 3) DELETE /api/purchases/{id} deletes purchase and reverses all changes, 4) GET /api/purchases/{id} returns single purchase details, 5) Edit/Delete buttons in PurchasesPage.js table (appear when purchases exist)

elements_verified: Left sidebar with task menu (قائمة المنتجات, المنتجات بالعائلة, قائمة الزبائن, etc.)
Center products table with columns (الكود, اسم المنتج, الكمية, عبوة, السعر, خصم%, المبلغ HT, ض.ق.م)
Right sidebar with 20 product shortcut buttons
Header with sale code (BV0001/26) and total display
Session warning banner when no open session
Customer select, warehouse select, price type select

GET_purchases_id.description: Returns single purchase by ID with all details

PUT_purchases_id.description: Updates paid_amount and notes, recalculates remaining and status
test_cases: Update to fully paid - status changes to 'paid'

DELETE_purchases_id.description: Deletes purchase and reverses stock, supplier balance, cash box changes

purchases_table_buttons.description: Edit and Delete buttons exist in PurchasesPage.js table with proper data-testid attributes
